title: This Is Bad... They Just Shut Down FABLE 5
summary: Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down by US government order after three days of public access. The video argues this raises concerns about whether frontier AI systems will remain accessible to the public or be restricted behind government controls.
writeup: The video reports that Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models were shut down by US government order three days after public access opened. It frames the event as a question about whether frontier AI systems will stay publicly accessible or end up restricted behind government controls. The central takeaway concerns the tension between public availability and government regulation of frontier models, and what such a shutdown signals for future access and AI safety policy.
